creator: tit@ispserver.com
text:
=C7=E4=F0=E0=E2=F1=F2=E2=F3=E9=F2=E5, bug-followup.

but in 7.0-STABLE all worked fine

msk-srv# uname -mr
7.0-STABLE amd64
msk-srv# dmesg | grep ^aa
aac0: <Adaptec RAID 3805> mem 0xd8400000-0xd85fffff irq 18 at device 14.0 o=
n pci11
